ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "total_area_sqm" REAL /* Total area of the building in square meters */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "energy_rating" TEXT /* Rating or certification for the building's energy efficiency */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last energy efficiency inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  "last_energy_audit" TEXT /* Date of the last energy audit */,
  "energy_audit_report" TEXT /* Reference to the report of the last energy audit */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "building_baseline" REAL /* Building's baseline energy consumption */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Current temperature in the building */,
  "crs_total" INTEGER /* Total cooling and heating performance */,
  "oat_c" REAL /* Outdoor air temperature */,
  "ssc_max" REAL /* Maximum system-specific consumption */,
  "normalized_lt" REAL /* Normalized load */,
  "ssc_scaled" REAL /* System-specific consumption scaled */,
  "crs_new" REAL /* New cooling and heating performance */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Current humidity level in the building */,
  "air_quality" REAL /* Current air quality index */,
  "lighting_level" REAL /* Current lighting level in the building */,
  "water_consumption" REAL /* Current water consumption */,
  "renewable_energy_usage" REAL /* Current usage of renewable energy sources */,
  "energy_efficiency_score" REAL /* Calculated score indicating the building's current energy efficiency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, energy consumption) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the building */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the sensor is installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, engineer, admin) */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the BEMS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the BEMS was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the user accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the report is generated for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, error) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)
